testcase.name: test_cashier_cannot_access_owner_shift
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter288_shift_id_mandatory.py:127: in test_cashier_cannot_access_owner_shift assert r.status_code in (403, 404), f"expected 403/404, got {r.status_code}: {r.text}" E AssertionError: expected 403/404, got 200: {"shift_id":"closefix-shift-cashier","branch_id":"76f56acc-6948-4a2f-bbf4-feccbddea88f","branch_name":"الفرع الرئيسي","cashier_id":"bcc0f333-6cf3-47af-b30c-ec06e7ae2359","cashier_name":"احمد اختبار","started_at":"2026-07-07T15:29:08.561271+00:00","opening_cash":0.0,"total_sales":802750.0,"total_cost":0.0,"gross_profit":802750.0,"total_orders":3,"cash_sales":802750.0,"card_sales":0,"credit_sales":0,"non_cash_amount":0,"delivery_app_sales":{},"driver_sales":0,"discounts_total":0.0,"cancelled_orders":0,"cancelled_amount":0,"cancelled_by":[],"total_expenses":0,"net_profit":802750.0,"expected_cash":802750.0,"total_refunds":0,"refund_count":0,"merged_shifts_count":0} E assert 200 in (403, 404) E + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_wa_logout_ok

failure.message: AssertionError: expected ok/success true: {'ok': False, 'error': 'Server disconnected without sending a response.'} assert (False is True or None is True) + where False = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfada58c9f080>('ok') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfada58c9f080> = {'ok': False, 'error': 'Server disconnected without sending a response.'}.get + and None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfada58c9f080>('success') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfada58c9f080> = {'ok': False, 'error': 'Server disconnected without sending a response.'}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter288_shift_id_mandatory.py:212: in test_wa_logout_ok assert d.get("ok") is True or d.get("success") is True, f"expected ok/success true: {d}" E AssertionError: expected ok/success true: {'ok': False, 'error': 'Server disconnected without sending a response.'} E assert (False is True or None is True) E + where False = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfada58c9f080>('ok') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfada58c9f080> = {'ok': False, 'error': 'Server disconnected without sending a response.'}.get E + and None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfada58c9f080>('success') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfada58c9f080> = {'ok': False, 'error': 'Server disconnected without sending a response.'}.get
